us_markets.note: Last trading day (Friday May 1 close) – US markets closed Sunday

sp500.detail: Record closing high, 5th straight weekly gain. Driven by tech stocks and robust earnings.

wti_crude.note: OPEC+ announced 188k bpd output increase; US crude exports surge to record amid Iran war

news_highlights: S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at record highs – 5th straight weekly gain
Berkshire Hathaway annual meeting: Greg Abel takes over as CEO, rules out break-up, stresses continuity
Spirit Airlines shuts down after failing to reach bailout deal
OPEC+ announces 188k bpd output increase in first meeting without UAE; US crude exports surge to record
Big Tech earnings show widening split between AI trade winners and losers
Healthcare cost surge makes parental paid leave a target of workplace cuts
economic_outlook: US markets remain in rally mode led by AI tech. Oil volatile on OPEC+ supply increase and geopolitics (Iran). Gold continues climb as safe haven. BTC consolidates around $78k.
